name: aeo-docs
description: Documentation skills suite. The `diataxis` skill produces user-facing docs (tutorials, how-to guides, references, explanations) following the Diataxis framework. The `architecture-docs` skill produces C4 diagrams, ADRs, OpenAPI specs, and system / component design docs. The `d2` and `markdown-mermaid` skills cover diagramming. Pure-skill plugin with no agents or slash commands.
